items.description: Currently in the 4th trimester (equivalent to the second academic year) with 19 out of 71 curriculum credits approved. Academic track originally started in 2018, paused due to international migration, and formally reactivated in 2026.
Graduated in Sciences. Cagua, Aragua State.

Cursando actualmente el 4° trimestre (equivalente al segundo año académico) con 19 de 71 materias aprobadas. Trayectoria académica iniciada originalmente en 2018, pausada por motivos de migración internacional y reactivada formalmente en 2026.
Graduado en Ciencias. Cagua, Estado Aragua.
